description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, geometric design with a square form and a series of horizontal slats on the front face, creating a visually striking, layered effect. The wood grain is prominent and consistent across all visible surfaces, suggesting a high-quality veneer or solid wood construction. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and minimalist aesthetic. The drawers are integrated seamlessly into the slatted front, with no visible handles or hardware, contributing to the sleek appearance. The overall finish is smooth with a subtle sheen, enhancing the natural beauty of the wood. This piece would be well-suited for contemporary urban interiors, such as lobbies, offices, or upscale residential spaces.
description: A modern, square chest of drawers with a slatted wood front and smooth, handleless surfaces, finished in a rich brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the distinctive horizontal slatted design and the seamless integration of drawers.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth, unadorned wood surface and the depth of the slatted front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the clean, solid wood surface and the edge of the slatted front.
